scope: CLEANUP: Replace indexOf with bytes.IndexByte, remove stageLabels identity map, remove reimplemented strings.Contains in logrender tests. These are small code quality fixes in the internal/logrender package and its tests, identified after the Log Command Redesign merged.

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 child: code-cleanups (leaf). Three independent cleanup tasks, no ordering constraints between them. All scoped to internal/logrender.
